非公开/INTERNAL — Project Jade Bamboo data processing & transfer workflow note — Embargo until 2026-07-15 09:00 CST.
Parties: Yonghe Cloud Robotics Co., Ltd. (fictional USCC: 9135Z1A2B3C4D5E6F) as data controller and issuer; Huilan HR Services (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. (fictional USCC: 9131X9K8M7N6P5Q4R) as entrusted processor.
Purpose: processing HR and investor-relations data in connection with the proposed acquisition of Hexa Sensors Qingdao Co., Ltd.; definitive Share Purchase Agreement signed 2026-06-28 for 80% equity at RMB 480,000,000.
Inside information notice: this document contains undisclosed information under the PRC Securities Law and the issuer’s insider list; distribution is restricted to need-to-know until the embargo lapses.
PIPL basis and scope: we process personal information related to identified or identifiable persons, including sensitive PI (e.g., minors under 14), for employment, payroll, and pre-deal communications.
Data examples (fictional): Mr. Zhao Renfu, Resident ID 420106199512302839, mobile 13900001234, employee no. E-77231; managed by Ms. Lin Qiyu, HR Director, lin.qiyu@ycrobotics.example.cn, +86-21-6000-1234.
Cross-border transfer: limited analytics to Bluebay Metrics Pte. Ltd. (Singapore, fictional) via mainland servers with encryption; we will execute the CAC Standard Contract and, if thresholds are met (≥100,000 data subjects), initiate a security assessment filing.
Data Security Law/DSL: no important data is identified in this workflow; network operators’ security obligations under the CSL are implemented via access controls, logs, and localization where applicable.
Retention and deletion: HR files retained 10 years post-termination; IR contact lists retained 24 months; upon expiry we delete or anonymize within 30 days and document the disposal.
MNPI safeguards: deal codename use only (“Project Jade Bamboo”); no external disclosure; IR draft Q&A to be prepared but not released until CSRC disclosure window opens.
MAC clause (negated and carve-outs): no Material Adverse Effect shall be deemed to occur due solely to changes in general economic conditions, but loss of the class A production permit would constitute a MAC.
Public-source reference: according to the public 2024 sensor industry yearbook by Huaxing Economic Research (fictional), regional demand is stable, which is not inside information.
DSAR workflow: requests to privacy@ycrobotics.example.cn will be verified using matched contact info and, where lawful, partial Resident ID digits; responses issued within 15 working days unless CAC/PSB inquiries suspend timelines.
project note (lowercase): todo: update the deal checklist, confirm SPA exhibits, and scrub personal names before wider circulation; also, wellness week spa-day vouchers are administrative and not transaction-related.
